description: A newly hired Patent Examiner must configure their Chrome browser according to the Examiner IT Workspace Standard. Organize bookmarks into the required folders, disable search suggestions for confidentiality, and set PDFs to open externally. Add pop-up exceptions for internal sites, create the required custom search engines, and sanitize the browser history of personal browsing from the previous user.
instruction: The Examiner IT Workspace Standard is located at ~/Desktop/examiner_it_standard.txt. Read it carefully and implement ALL requirements exactly. You must organize the existing bookmarks into four specific folders, modify Chrome's search suggestion and PDF settings for security/workflow reasons, allow popups for USPTO domains, add custom search engines for 'gp' and 'wipo', purge personal domains from the browsing history while keeping work domains, and finally open three specific work tabs.
